description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short Dolman sleeves, slits on the shoulder, metal stud detailing and printed graphics on the chestFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this luxe top with its plush fabric. The stud detailing adds an interesting dimension to this understated top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a tonal shrug or jacket.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
